hyperedges.label: Phase 4 retrieval sub-pipeline: 3 streams fused via RRF
Index pipeline flow: walker → chunker → enricher → embedder → storage
Adapter framework: protocol + registry + loader + drift detection
Hybrid retrieval (dense + BM25 + symbol tokens fused via RRF)
Indexing pipeline: walker → chunker → enricher → embedder → storage
Indexing pipeline: Walker → Chunker → Embedder → Storage
Language-specific chunkers dispatched by Chunker registry
Per-language chunker sub-adapters dispatched by tree-sitter-dispatch
Hybrid RRF retrieval streams (dense + sparse + symbol)
Full stropha pipeline stage adapters (walk → chunk → enrich → embed → store → retrieve)
